hypothesis: If an equivariant graph neural network-based diffusion model incorporating energy-based scoring with Hamiltonian Monte Carlo refinement is applied to amorphous material generation, then it will produce structurally valid amorphous configurations with radial distribution functions, bond angle distributions, and potential energy distributions that closely match those of reference molecular dynamics simulations, because the physical symmetry constraints of the EGNN combined with energy landscape guidance will steer the denoising trajectory toward thermodynamically plausible local atomic arrangements.
